docket_entries.description: SEE REGISTER OF ACTION (BOOK) PRIOR TO 03/06/95
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILLSTRAND, JOANNE KERPAN, JANETH AS TO DEFENDANT BERMINGHAM, JOHN JOSEPH
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.
APPL FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLSTRAND, JOANNE KERPAN, JANETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMINGHAM, JOHN JOSEPH $98,347.57 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $98,347.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
